{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032017034990154DCB56094EBCCDCF"}"},"total":3},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7499127431527662361","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者大大加油更新啊，很期待后面的情节，到底两个人能不能安稳的在一起啊。希望他们不要回去就待在胶州好了，感觉后面会虐"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1746029969,"group_id":"7493548811508255806","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/2VpfgWAFKnRxVOGr/EKaU=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"693170560314228","user_name":"北海岛的桐瑶"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"693170560314228","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7493548811508255806","book_info":{"abstract":"【前期宠后期会虐+欢喜冤家+科举+互宠+皇亲国戚】
   
    若有人问杨钰，他是从何时开始记事的，杨钰一定会毫不犹豫的回答道：“五岁时遇到赵聿的时候。”赵聿也会说，那一年的夏天，他在王府的花园里，抱住了他的太阳。
    五岁时杨钰随母亲赴宴，竟遇到了庆王府家的二公子赵聿，下一刻便巴巴的黏住赵聿不放。做了伴读后的杨钰还是懒懒散散，丝毫没有身为伴读的自觉性，经常还要赵聿帮他完成夫子布置的任务。
    某天赵聿看着在榻上悠哉的吃着点心的白面团子，恨恨的说道：“咱俩谁是谁的伴读。”榻上的某人无耻的回道：“互相为伴嘛，自己人我才用着放心。”气的赵聿恨不得把手上的笔掰断。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o191b805407a47ed395be5897702ea080~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"爱吃进京乳腐的玉一鸣","author_id":"","book_id":"7493548811508255806","book_name":"成为王府伴读后我成功躺平了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282028","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":758,"name":"古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=758&name=古代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":836,"name":"互宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=836&name=互宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7493549634296480318","read_count":"187","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"150109"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"51","tags":"双男主,纯爱,古代,互宠","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o191b805407a47ed395be5897702ea080~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779181429&x-signature=Djuwm54KdYWdSmJqKjI8fBbDTQQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4393248411888872","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"22"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032017034990154DCB56094EBCCDCF"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读56分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":2,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3367,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":1025},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7606728710419776280","common":{"comment_type":-90,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"为啥呀，一直到40章的时候还一直都是甜甜的，50章的时候杨突然就全家灭门了，然后就结束了，为啥呀？[哭][哭][哭]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771081902,"group_id":"7493548811508255806","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4418279855884244"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7493548811508255806","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"56"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":8489,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7606699143776994072","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"虽然只是看了几章，但是挺好看的。文章也很幽默，偶尔描写的人物想法也很有意思，而且短短几章就有不同母亲和孩子相处的模式。比如杨（主角）的母亲有点望子成龙，但是儿子真要当人家伴读有有点担心，心底里还是觉得儿子平安比出息更重要。赵（主角）的母亲对待子女都比较关心，虽然觉得小女儿长的有点像婆婆不太好看，但是没有为此偏心，还是很娇宠小女儿。但是赵的母亲的母亲对待自己的孩子就很偏心，因为长子、长女（赵的母亲）在自己婆婆身前教养过，于是就偏心自己的小儿子甚至是自己的侄女，索性赵的母亲现在有了一定权利，面对母亲的偏心不必受气甚至能反击。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771075520,"group_id":"7493548811508255806","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+kbxCuV5kSnbh8G+jAWAX5aXcJiCiZYMx22JAjHypyF","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"4418279855884244","user_name":"祤䴀"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4418279855884244","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7493548811508255806","book_info":{"abstract":"【前期宠后期会虐+欢喜冤家+科举+互宠+皇亲国戚】

    五岁时杨钰随母亲赴宴，竟遇到了庆王府家的二公子赵聿，下一刻便巴巴的黏住赵聿不放。做了伴读后的杨钰还是懒懒散散，丝毫没有身为伴读的自觉性，经常还要赵聿帮他完成夫子布置的任务。
